title: hieracium murorum subsp. pediaeum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pediaeum, also known as Hawkweed, is a plant species that belongs to the dandelion-like plants in the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. pediaeum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
